path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali will face challenges.jpeg
text: hakim:4677 - Ahmad b. Sahl al-Faqth Bibukhara > Sahl b. al-Mutawakkil > Ahmad b. YGinus > Muhammad b. Fudayl > Abi Hayyan al-Taymi > Sa1d b. Jubayr > Ibn ‘Abbas [Machine] The Prophet £ said to Ali, "Verily, you will face challenges after me." Ali asked, "Will I be safe in my religion?" The Prophet replied, "You will be safe in your religion." @ - Sound Chain per Bukhart and Muslim (Dhahabi)
